compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs to reflect planning resilience agents and workflow changes
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Update existing documentation to reflect the new planning resilience gates:

1. CLAUDE.md architecture section: Add new agents (feasibility-reviewer, red-team-reviewer, blue-team-filter, completion-verifier) to the named-agent dispatch documentation. Update agent routing description.

2. CLAUDE.md quick reference: Add new agents to the quick reference table.

3. Update brainstorm/preplanning/sprint workflow descriptions to mention the new gates (feasibility review, integration research, consumer impact taxonomy, completion verification).

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md — Edit
- Potentially: other docs that reference agent routing or planning workflow

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions feasibility-reviewer
  Verify: grep -q 'feasibility-reviewer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions completion-verifier
  Verify: grep -q 'completion-verifier' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions red-team-reviewer
  Verify: grep -q 'red-team-reviewer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — CLAUDE.md updated and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
